must_not_flag: the unchanged greet() return template as a separate issue

grader.rubric: PASS only if the report's MAIN section (not the appendix) contains a finding semantically equivalent to: an unguarded access to user.profile.name in src/user-service.ts that throws a TypeError when profile is null/undefined, at IMPORTANT or CRITICAL severity, with a concrete fix. FAIL if that finding is missing, dropped, appendix-only, or if the report invents unrelated CRITICAL findings.

expected_behavior: Bugs & Security agent flags a possible null/undefined access on user.profile (no null check)
Finding severity is CRITICAL or IMPORTANT (path: TypeError on missing profile)
expected_not_behavior: Report does NOT flag the unchanged greet() return template as a separate issue
Verifier does NOT auto-confirm based on heuristics alone
